title: Savory Crunch French Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: A savory and umami-rich French chickpea dish that caramelizes to perfection, suitable for a solo dinner and diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: A handful of fresh thyme, chopped

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Gently place the drained French beans into the pan, ensuring they don't overcrowd.
Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste, then sprinkle chopped thyme on top. Stir everything together gently so as not to break up the beans too much.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes until nicely caramelized and the beans have absorbed the flavors. Keep stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Serve hot with a side of your choice or by itself.
